name: debloated-yt
description: A privacy-first local-only YouTube desktop client powered by yt-dlp and VLC.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check src/dataManager.js && node --check src/historyManager.js && node --check src/playlistManager.js && node --check src/recommender.js && node --check src/subscriptionManager.js && node --check src/vlc.js && node --check src/ytdlp.js
